title: vanilla experience : the best client-side modpack
description: the best modpack for multiplayer which brings together all the best optimization, utility and decoration mods for a maximum Minecraft experience.

# What is vanilla experience ❓
> Vanilla experience is a client-side modpack for Minecraft that add **quality of life** features and graphique, particules and effect, while keeping the game relatively stable for the performance.

# what does it add to Minecraft ? (Features) ➕
>  glade you ask !
> just check by yourself !
1. bars for effect duration
2. custom chunk loading animation
3. connect t oany server version
4. immersive thunder storm
5. new satistique screen
6. selection with your mouse

# does Vanilla experience have cheat 🚔?
No, Vanilla Experience doesn't have cheat, **BUT** ❗❗❗NOTICE❗❗❗ that if you are using a controller, you can be ban for invalid movement that can be refer to cheat, so be aware.
